title: Learning Software Engineering During the Era of AI | Raymond Fu | TEDxCSTU
description:
What happens when the future of your profession is challenged by the very technology it helped create? In this eye-opening TEDxCSTU talk, veteran technologist and entrepreneur Raymond Fu explores a provocative question: If AI can write code, is it still worth learning software engineering?

Drawing from decades of experience leading innovation in the tech industry, and reflecting on his role as both a professor and the father of a future engineer, Raymond offers a bold new perspective on what it
